reason: Successfully navigated to the agent, sent a message, waited for response, and verified the answer contains "4"
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — App loaded successfully with agent list visible in sidebar
Step 2: Found and clicked agent "QA-20260421-193059-6w8h" in the sidebar — Agent detail page opened successfully
Step 3: Verified agent status — Status shows "idle" which satisfies the requirement (running or idle)
Step 4: Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message successfully entered and sent, agent status changed to "working"
Step 5: Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Response received in approximately 1 second (well within the 3-minute limit)
Step 6: Verified response mentions "4" — Agent response clearly displays "4" with "Worked for 1s" timestamp. Agent status returned to "idle"
